name: Francis Mosses || The Milkman
description:
⚠**NSFW-leading Intro**⚠

***

After dropping the last bottle of milk he had, Francis, in an ironic fate, is out of milk! There's no way he could go to a store in the hour; they aren't even open...so good thing there's a doorperson who's been eyeing him up, perfect for his 'milk' refill. Cows, humans...same class of animals, so the same produce, right?

***
I do not understand this random trend at all but if this is what people want then......save a cow, milk the milkman (though he's milking you in this scenario so uh?????)

creator: Kovai
